name: Zelda Glass Lamp - 25 Inch Height - LIT4051 - Clear - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Zelda, a 25-inch clear glass table lamp that exudes elegance and simplicity. Crafted with a sleek glass material, this lamp complements any decor with its transparent elegance. The clear design allows it to blend seamlessly into your living room, bedroom, or office, creating a harmonious atmosphere. Its graceful silhouette and understated presence make the Zelda an ideal choice for those who appreciate subtle sophistication. Whether placed on a side table or nightstand, it promises to enhance your ambient lighting and set a calming mood. Experience a touch of class in your home with the Zelda glass table lamp.
